headline: Forget Amazon, If Oil Hits $100, Walmart Is the Only Retailer Built to Thrive the Squeeze
summary: Amazon is dominating financial headlines right now, and sure, AWS grew 24% in Q4 and the AI story is real. But here’s what you should actually be watching. I’ve seen this movie before. A company announces a jaw-dropping capex plan, the Street cheers the vision, and retirement accounts quietly absorb the risk. Andy Jassy just ... Forget Amazon, If Oil Hits $100, Walmart Is the Only Retailer Built to Thrive the Squeeze

headline: Erste Group Downgrades Walmart (WMT) to Hold from Buy; FTC Settlement Adds Pressure
summary: Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) is included among the 13 Best Defensive Dividend Stocks for 2025. On March 5, Erste Group downgraded Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) to Hold from Buy. Earlier, on February 26, Reuters reported that Walmart agreed to pay $100 million to settle charges related to earnings for delivery drivers. The US Federal Trade Commission said […]

headline: Walmart Beauty Push And New Supercenter Shape Higher Margin Growth Story
summary: Walmart has launched the exclusive Schwarzkopf KERATÎME Care & Styling line in its stores, featuring Multiplex Bonding Technology aimed at mass beauty shoppers. The company is supporting the rollout with immersive in store pop up events and influencer appearances focused on the beauty aisle experience. Walmart has also opened a new flagship Supercenter in The Villages, designed to combine technology and local partnerships to support community growth. For investors watching NasdaqGS:WMT,...
